query:
-- Create training sets for each user
INSERT INTO training_sets (id, userId, name, description, openingIds, createdAt) VALUES
('ts_sarah_1', 1200359, 'Italian Game', 'Master the Italian Game opening', JSON_ARRAY('italian_game'), NOW()),
('ts_marcus_1', 1200360, 'French Defense', 'Learn French Defense strategies', JSON_ARRAY('french_defense'), NOW()),
('ts_priya_1', 1200361, 'Sicilian Defense', 'Sicilian Defense mastery', JSON_ARRAY('sicilian_defense'), NOW()),
('ts_david_1', 1200362, 'Ruy Lopez', 'Ruy Lopez opening training', JSON_ARRAY('ruy_lopez'), NOW()),
('ts_emma_1', 1200363, 'Caro-Kann Defense', 'Caro-Kann Defense training', JSON_ARRAY('caro_kann'), NOW());

-- Verify training sets created
SELECT id, userId, name FROM training_sets WHERE userId IN (1200359, 1200360, 1200361, 1200362, 1200363);
